creator: martin@matuska.org
text:
Here is a better patch (attached) that adds the folowing features:
- support for apache above 2.0
- NOPORTDOCS knob
- if version gets outdated, the old ones and the latest are located in:
http://www.heuer.org/mod_auth_mysql/old/

Tinderbox log:
http://tinderbox.vx.sk/logs/6.2-FreeBSD-amd64/mod_auth_mysql-1.9.log
